notes:
## 1.5.7

- **Dual Messenger / clone apps** — Home and Categories list every launcher profile (e.g. two WhatsApps). Customize and open each separately.
- **Guardian gate** — impatient double-taps can no longer skip the second code.
- **WhatsApp Updates** — detects the selected Updates/Status tab and bounces out again.
- **DNS ground rules** — Steady site + GitHub always allowed; allow/block site changes apply immediately to the live filter.
